title: Where can I check gross sales I realized on a specific period?
bodyHtml:
1 - Access the “Orders” tab in your Back Office

 

2 - Click on the button “Export File”  on the top right of the order page, and “Export all orders”

 

3 - Select all wanted filters and click on “Export File” on the bottom

 

4 - Click on the profile emoji on the top right of the screen, and “File library”

 

5 - Download the newest export clicking on the arrow

 

6 - Your export should appear in a few seconds.
